The Mirror Pool

How to Play
遊び方 · Game Rules
1
Study the World Above
The top grid shows the pattern the Kitsune demands. Tiles with a dashed border are broken — they need to be restored.
2
Rearrange the Reflection
The bottom grid is the mirror — only you can change it. Click any tile to select it, then click a second tile to swap them.
3
Match the Pattern
When a broken tile gets the correct piece, it lights up green. Fill all broken tiles to complete the rite.
🦊
Nine Tails & Favor
Solve cleanly to earn Kitsune Favor — blessings make puzzles easier. Struggle and she grows displeased — curses make tiles drift and deceive. Earn all 9 tails to awaken the Celestial Fox.
⚠
Nogitsune Mode
The trickster fox is unleashed. Illusion tiles look correct but lie. The mirror drifts against you. Not for the faint of heart.
